channel.title: Image Translation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Image Translation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Document translation for image files (synchronous, single document)
item.description:
Azure AI Translator now generally supports synchronous translation of a single image document in one API call. Supported input includes standalone image files such as JPEG and PNG, with the translated result returned immediately.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Image file translation for batch document translation in Azure AI Translator
item.description:
Azure AI Translator batch document translation now generally supports image files as input. It performs OCR on supported image formats and translates the extracted text into the target language.

  • Source: Azure Updates
